name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the oleo, oil, and sugar.
2. Add eggs, vanilla, and sour milk. Mix well.
3. Sift dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon) into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture, beating well after each addition.
5. Fold in grated zucchini until evenly distributed.
6. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9-inch pan and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until done. This cake is great topped with cream cheese frosting.
8. To prepare the cream cheese frosting, see the separate Cream Cheese Frosting recipe below.
Cream Cheese Frosting:
1. In a large bowl, beat together softened cream cheese (3 ounces), softened butter (4 tablespoons), and vanilla.
2. Gradually add sifted powdered sugar (2 1/2 cups) to the cream cheese mixture, beating until smooth.
3. Frost the cooled cake once it has completely finished baking.
